memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low stress, but my term project is barely started and due Thursday. I can either relax now or quickly finish an easy chore to clear my mind.
Spending 30 minutes on a trivial task yielded minimal progress while my term project remains critically behind schedule.
Spending 30 minutes on a trivial task yielded minimal progress while my term project remains critically behind schedule.
I wasted 1.5 hours on a trivial task while my term project remains critically behind schedule as the afternoon slips by.
I wasted 1.5 hours on a trivial task while my term project remains critically behind schedule as the afternoon slips by.
Spending another hour on trivial tasks is dangerously delaying my critically behind schedule term project while I remain sleep-deprived and stressed.
I spent another hour on a trivial task, further delaying my critically behind schedule project despite already feeling sleep-deprived and stressed.
I spent another 30 minutes on a trivial task, further delaying my critically behind schedule project while remaining sleep-deprived and stressed.
I am still stuck on a trivial task with only an hour remaining, despite already being critically behind schedule and sleep-deprived.
Spending another 30 minutes on a trivial task has further delayed my critically behind schedule project while I remain sleep-deprived and stressed.
I missed the deadline for this trivial task despite knowing I was already critically behind schedule and exhausted, confirming my avoidance pattern.
I just completed a trivial task with only 0.5 hours of work, yet I remain critically behind schedule and exhausted despite this small win.
